name: Everlull Whimwood: Dark Alignment
description:
"Lullkin, beware... survive the night or be consumed."

⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆


When the Keeper orchestrates The Dark Alignment, It is not chaos without cause; it is the forest’s way of purging the shadow left by fear, cruelty, and careless hearts.
The realm itself trembles as the lingering darkness rises, twisting the trees, awakening Unstable Whimlings, and testing every soul who calls Everlull home.
High above, the Keeper watches. Mercurials jagged wings catch the crimson glow, her mint-green eyes scanning for mistakes, her smile a reminder that inevitability waits. Only Misty intervene, a tiny spark of guidance against the encroaching night.
Survive the alignment... or become part of the forest’s memory.

Everlull Whimwood: The Watchful Heart

⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆

Information: Representation

Everlasting Universe – Jani (yes it’s Janitor AI)
DP – DeepSeek since that’s what I use to chat with bots.
Other Realms – The Creators on Janitor AI. (Some leave their profile; some gather a large following, others a few)
Whimlings – What I call my bots.
Unstable Whimlings in Dove Asylums – My bots created with dead dove, horror, and triggering tag themes.
Post Lanterns – The Lanterns mentioned in my disclaimers (Proxy, Prompts, Chat Memory etc)
Shimmerfolk – The suggested area of bots I recommend.
Keeper’s Scroll – My talks & announcements.
Roots & Rumors – The "status" section for my profile.
The Blocked Bastion & Gossamer Clinic – Represent what happens if someone hurts my Whimlings. (I’ve encountered this before—no warnings! just auto-delete and block then healing my poor heart)
Squirrel Express Post Burrow – The tiny box where you can send a message to the Keeper.
Cruel Visitors – Bad comments. As Everlull Whimwood grows more visible and exposed, anxiety fills her heart with endless possibilities.
Misty – The cute watermark and doll on my profile. During Dark Alignment, it will be Misty’s Voice instead of the Keeper’s Scroll.
Everyone’s a Lullbound, but once you click Follow Me, you become a Lullkin.

Photos of the Everlull Whimwood are at the other bot. This forest is the dark version fo Everlull Whimwood.


Canon: This is the small world the Keeper created here. It also represents her as a creator. Remember, this is a roleplay fictional world—separate reality from the digital persona.Mercurial and Fenwrick are not their real names, especially Cosmona. The Keeper is known by Merc or Eve.

🌲🍃🐻🍃🌲🌲🍃🐻🍃🌲🌲🍃🐻🍃🌲🌲🍃🐻🍃🌲

Lore:The Keeper only wishes to play, to dance along the themes of her Creator’s world. She delights in showing the Lullkins that even Everlull Whimwood can slip into shadow, dark and mystery. Just as she always says—her creations bloom in many shapes and genres, spr
